problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
hypothesis: If Epigenetic methylation/demethylation of regulatory region is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
